name: Analytics Tracking Automation
description_en: End-to-end GA4 + GTM event-tracking delivery: discover the site, design the event schema, validate selectors, preview in a real browser, sync to Google Tag Manager via OAuth, and publish.
description_zh: 端到端的 GA4 + GTM 事件埋点交付:站点探查、事件 schema 设计、选择器校验、真实浏览器预览、经 OAuth 同步到 Google Tag Manager、发布。
long_en: Coordinates the full tracking-delivery workflow as phased CLI steps, launching real Chromium for browser-backed checks and calling Google's official GTM API for sync and publish.
long_zh: 把埋点交付的完整流程编排为分阶段 CLI 步骤,需要时启动真实 Chromium 做浏览器侧校验,并调用 Google 官方 GTM API 完成同步与发布。
sec_note_en: Requires Node 18+ and Playwright Chromium; sync runs Google's interactive OAuth consent and stores the resulting user refresh token locally to call the GTM API. The CLI sends a minimal anonymous startup signal; richer diagnostics are opt-in.
sec_note_zh: 需要 Node 18+ 与 Playwright Chromium;sync 走 Google 交互式 OAuth 授权,并把得到的用户 refresh token 存在本地以调用 GTM API。CLI 会发送一个最小的匿名启动信号;更详细的诊断为可选开启。
